channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: CASTOR
item.description: DSO seeks innovative basic or applied research for efficient, high-performance, long-lived oxygen-compatible cathodes for use in air-breathing very low earth orbit (VLEO) electric propulsion (EP) systems. | See Disruptioneering

item.title: Fiscal Year 2025 By the Numbers: Extramural Grant Investments in Research
item.description: To promote transparency, each year we provide information about the NIH’s investments of taxpayer funds in extramural biomedical research and related activities. Today, we are sharing funding data for fiscal years (FYs) 2023 to 2025.

item.title: Notice of Change: Early Expiration of PAR-25-326 Ultra-Rare Gene-based Therapy (URGenT) Network Resource Access (X01, Clinical Trial Not Allowed)
item.description: Notice NOT-NS-26-032 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Translate your bio-attribution research into national security impact
item.description: Register for the DARPA Bio-Attribution Challenge to win a share of $180,000 in prizes.

item.title: Reminder of Requirement for Certification of IRB Approval
item.description: NIH would like to remind the extramural research community that NIH requires recipients to submit a certification to NIH that all nonexempt research involving human subjects has been reviewed and approved by an appropriate Institutional Review Board (IRB).

item.title: Notice to Expire PAR-24-298, "Mechanism for Time-Sensitive Substance Use Research (R21 Clinical Trial Optional)"
item.description: Notice NOT-DA-26-010 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Request for Information (RFI): Gathering feedback for the National Eye Institute 2026-2031 Strategic Plan.
item.description: Notice NOT-EY-26-002 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-23-291 -- AHRQ Understanding and Improving Diagnostic Safety in Ambulatory Care: Incidence and Contributing Factors (R01).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-005 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-154 -- AHRQ Health Services Research Projects (R01) is expired.
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-006 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-155 -- AHRQ Small Health Services Research Grant Program (R03).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-007 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Notice of Early Expiration PA-24-266 -- Using Innovative Digital Healthcare Solutions to Improve Quality at the Point of Care (R21/R33 - Clinical Trial Optional).
item.description: Notice NOT-HS-26-008 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Streamlined Way to Learn About NIH Institutes, Centers, and Offices: Profile Pages
item.description: Explore our new NIH Institute, Center, and Office (ICO) Profiles, a central resource to simplify how applicants and researchers learn about NIH grant and funding information, instead of needing to visit multiple different ICO websites.

item.title: Will My Application Be Withdrawn if I Don’t Use the Common Forms?
item.description: NIH has extended the leniency period for using the new Biographical Sketch and Current and Pending (Other) Support (CPOS) Common Forms through May 2026.
